title: Log in and reach the main shell
description: A returning user can sign in with email or username and password and arrive in the main app shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the home area

title: Register a new account and enter the app
description: A new user can complete registration with valid details, accept the terms, and reach the authenticated app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Switch to create account mode
Fill in the username field with a new unique username
Fill in the profile name field with a new display name
Fill in the email field with a new unique email address
Fill in the birth date field with a valid date
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the confirm password field with the same valid password
Accept the terms checkbox
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the home area

title: Open each main section from the home drawer
description: A signed-in user can open each primary destination from the home shell and reach the expected section.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Open the navigation drawer
Open the feed section
Verify the feed is displayed
Open the streamers section
Verify the streamers section is displayed
Open the messages section
Verify the chat screen is displayed
Open the notifications section
Verify the notifications screen is displayed
Open the profile section
Verify the profile screen is displayed
Open the settings section
Verify the settings screen is displayed

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: A user sees a login error when entering incorrect credentials and cannot enter the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with an invalid account identifier
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Log out from settings
description: A logged-in user can sign out from settings and return to the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the settings page from the main shell
Log out from the account
Verify the login screen is displayed

title: Prevent registration with mismatched passwords
description: A user cannot create an account when the password and confirmation do not match.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Switch to create account mode
Fill in the username field with a new unique username
Fill in the profile name field with a new display name
Fill in the email field with a new unique email address
Fill in the birth date field with a valid date
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the confirm password field with a different valid password
Accept the terms checkbox
Submit the registration form
Verify a password confirmation validation error is visible

title: Send a direct message in an existing conversation
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can open a conversation and send a new direct message that appears in the thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Open a conversation
Type a message
Send the message
Verify the new message is displayed in the thread

title: Mark notifications as read
description: A user can mark notifications as read and see the unread state clear in the notifications list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open the notifications screen
Mark notifications as read
Verify the unread state is cleared
Verify the notification list remains visible

title: Browse the feed and interact with a post
description: A logged-in user can open the feed, browse content, and like, repost, save, and reply to a post.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the feed from the main shell
Scroll the feed
Like a post
Repost a post
Save a post
Open the comments for a post and reply
Verify the feed remains visible with the post interactions applied

title: Show validation errors for incomplete registration
description: A user sees validation feedback when attempting to register with missing or invalid account details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Switch to create account mode
Submit the registration form
Verify registration validation errors are visible

title: Show unread indicators in the home shell
description: A signed-in user sees unread badge indicators in the home shell when there are unread messages or notifications.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Verify unread message and notification indicators are displayed when there are unread items

title: Edit and save own profile information
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can edit their profile and see the updated profile details after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Open profile editing
Update the profile information
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile details are displayed

title: Create a text post that appears in the feed
description: A logged-in user can publish a text post and see it appear in the feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the feed from the main shell
Create a new text post
Submit the post
Verify the new post is displayed in the feed

title: Search for people and posts
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can search and see matching people or posts returned.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /search
Enter a search query
Verify matching search results are displayed

title: Open related content from a notification
description: A user can open a notification and reach the related post, reply, mention, or message thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open the notifications screen
Open a notification
Verify the related content is displayed
Verify the originating notification is no longer the only visible context

title: View a profile and follow or unfollow the user
description: A logged-in user can open another profile from search and follow or unfollow that account.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the search page from the main shell
Fill in the search field with a valid user query
Open the user profile from search results
Follow the user
Unfollow the user
Verify the profile follow state updates

title: Prevent registration without accepting terms
description: A user cannot complete registration until the terms checkbox is accepted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Switch to create account mode
Fill in the username field with a new unique username
Fill in the profile name field with a new display name
Fill in the email field with a new unique email address
Fill in the birth date field with a valid date
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the confirm password field with the same valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify a terms acceptance validation error is visible

title: Follow and unfollow another user
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can follow another profile and then unfollow the same profile.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Follow the displayed user
Unfollow the same user
Verify the profile returns to the unfollowed state

title: Send a message in an existing chat thread
description: A logged-in user can open chat and send a message to an existing conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the chat page from the main shell
Open an existing conversation
Fill in the message field with a short message
Send the message
Verify the sent message appears in the conversation

title: Search for users or posts and open a result
description: A logged-in user can search for content and open a matching result from the search page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the search page from the main shell
Fill in the search field with a valid query
Open a search result
Verify the selected result is displayed

title: Review a moderation report and resolve it
description: An authorized admin can open the moderation queue, review a report, and accept or reject it so the queue updates.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the admin page from the main shell
Open a report in the moderation queue
Accept or reject the report
Verify the moderation queue updates

title: Open a profile from search results
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can open a user profile from search results and view the profile page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /search
Enter a search query
Open a matching user result
Verify the profile page is displayed

title: Start a direct message from a profile or chat flow
description: A logged-in user can open a profile and begin a direct message conversation from there.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the search page from the main shell
Fill in the search field with a valid user query
Open the user profile from search results
Start a direct message from the profile
Verify the chat thread is opened

title: Browse notifications and open a related item
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can open notifications and navigate to the related content from a notification item.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /notifications
Open a notification
Verify the related content is displayed

title: Return to the home shell from a section
description: A signed-in user can leave a section and return to the main home shell without losing access to navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Open the navigation drawer
Open the feed section
Open the navigation drawer
Return to the home shell
Verify the home shell is displayed

title: Open notifications and follow a deep link
description: A logged-in user can open notifications and navigate to the related post or message thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the notifications page from the main shell
Open a notification
Verify the related content or thread is displayed

title: Open a post from search results
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can open a post from search results and view the post details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /search
Enter a search query
Open a matching post result
Verify the post is displayed

title: Toggle the app theme
description: A user can switch between light and dark appearance and keep using the app with the updated theme.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open the settings screen
Toggle the theme setting
Verify the updated appearance is applied
Verify the settings screen remains accessible

title: View profile details and posts
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can open a profile and see the profile details and posts.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Verify profile details are displayed
Verify the user's posts are displayed

title: Open saved posts from the home drawer
description: A signed-in user can reach the saved posts collection from the home shell and view saved content when it exists.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Open the navigation drawer
Open the saved posts section
Verify the saved posts collection is displayed

title: Open full-screen media or story content
description: A logged-in user can open media or story content from the feed and view it full screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the feed from the main shell
Open a story or media item
Verify the full-screen media view is displayed

title: Review and accept a moderation report
description: An admin can review a pending report and accept a moderation action from the admin queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open the admin moderation screen
Review a pending report
Accept the moderation action
Verify the moderation queue is updated
Verify the reviewed report is no longer pending

title: Review and reject a moderation report
description: An admin can review a pending report and reject a moderation action from the admin queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open the admin moderation screen
Review a pending report
Reject the moderation action
Verify the moderation queue is updated
Verify the reviewed report is no longer pending

title: Switch between sign-in and account creation modes
description: A user can switch from sign-in to account creation mode and back again without losing access to the login flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Switch to create account mode
Return to login mode
Verify the sign-in form is displayed

title: Open saved posts collection
description: A logged-in user can open the saved posts area and view saved content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the saved posts page from the main shell
Verify the saved posts collection is displayed

title: Open streamers, live, and painters sections from the shell
description: A logged-in user can navigate to the discovery sections from the home shell drawer.

Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the streamers section from the main shell
Open the live section from the main shell
Open the painters section from the main shell
Verify each discovery section is displayed

title: Open live and painters sections from the home drawer
description: A signed-in user can navigate from the home shell to the live and painters sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Open the navigation drawer

Verify the live section is displayed
Open the painters section
Verify the painters section is displayed

title: Update theme preferences in settings
description: A logged-in user can open settings and change the app theme preference.

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the settings page from the main shell

Verify the updated theme preference is displayed

title: Show an empty state for no search results
description: A logged-in user sees an empty state when a search returns no matching users or posts.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the search page from the main shell
Fill in the search field with a unique nonsense query
Verify an empty search state is visible

title: See an empty chat state when no conversations exist
description: Verifies that a logged-in user sees an empty chat state when there are no conversations to open.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Verify an empty state message is displayed

title: See an empty state when search has no matches
description: Verifies that a logged-in user sees an empty state when a search query returns no matches.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /search
Enter a unique search query with no expected matches
Verify an empty state message is displayed

title: View an empty notifications state
description: A user with no notifications sees an empty state instead of a list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open the notifications screen
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify the notification list is not shown

title: See an empty notifications state
description: Verifies that a logged-in user sees an empty state when there are no notifications.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /notifications
Verify an empty state message is displayed

description: A logged-in user sees an empty state when no saved posts are available.
